betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Lens Block§f is the heavy optical component used as a structural block inside the §6Observatory§f (10019) and as a critical ingredient for the §6Vacuum-Chamber High Power Laser Emitter§f (10014). It is the first §6crafted component§f in the AR progression that requires a multiblock machine — you cannot hand-craft it.

§6Production Path (blocklens.json)§f:
- Machine: §6Precision Assembling Machine§f (10012) at 100 ticks
- Input: 1x §6Iron Rod§f (any), 3x §6Lens§f (advancedrocketry:lens), 3x §6Glass§f
- Output: 1x §6Lens Block§f (advancedrocketry:blocklens)
- Energy: 1 RF/t while running

The block behaves identically to vanilla glass in light transmission but emits a soft glow when powered; place it as the central lens element of an Observatory multiblock to focus the telescope. It is also the recipe output for the §6Sawmill§f and a key ingredient in the Vacuum Laser etcher.

§eTip§f: A §6Lens§f (the small item, advancedrocketry:lens) is made in the §6Quartz Crucible§f (10005) from §1quartz§f + §1diamond§f — stock up on these before you start the Precision Assembler, because the 3× lens per block makes the recipe a real bottleneck.
